# SOURCE-DSP: Digital Skill Pack
> **Pessoa:** Jeremy Haynes
> **Programa:** Digital Skill Pack (DSP)
> **Tipo:** Course (10 modules + Legal + Resources)
> **Arquivos:** 137 files | 1.48MB total
> **Data Processamento:** 2026-03-22
> **Pipeline:** Jarvis Full Auto (Opus)
> **Elementos Extraidos:** 204 (FIL:37, MM:36, HEU:64, FRM:38, MET:29)

---

|--------|------|----------|-------|----------|-----------|

---

## TOP FRAMEWORKS EXTRAIDOS

1. **Personality Brand Revenue Framework** (4 Pilares: Info Product + Omnipresence + Tools + Outbid)
2. **Bully Method** (Max bid = net profit, daily budget = 5x bid, manual bidding dominance)
3. **Surf Method** (+20% budget every 2-3hrs, midnight reset, automated stop-loss rules)
4. **Venus Flytrap Ad Strategy** (3-video sequence → 75% watch → pitch, full implementation)
5. **Brand Building Advertising Model** (7 phases: Cold → Customer Bridge → Upsells)
6. **37 Page Types Taxonomy** (Pre-sale, Opt-in, Thank You, Sales, Order, OTO, Webinar, Membership)
7. **22 Funnel Types Architecture** (Squeeze to Summit, complete classification)
8. **Omnipresence Retargeting Funnel** (engagement → video view retarget → lead → conversion)
9. **Info Product Ecosystem Architecture** (Addition first → Multiplication, complementary products)
10. **Facebook Rules Automation Framework** (Pause/Scale/ROAS Guard/Unpause rules)

## NOTAS DE PROCESSAMENTO

- Modules 04 (CF Intro) had lowest DNA value — mostly navigation tutorials
- Module 10 (Dropshipping) is guest content by Ryan Carrol, not JH philosophy
- PDF files in most modules are Megalodon Marketing cover pages (low content)
- Legal templates (18 files) have operational value but low DNA value
- Resources section (22 files) contains actual agency playbooks with high strategic value
- Venus Flytrap implementation details significantly expand the existing VFT framework from IC batches
- Bully Method and Surf Method are NEW frameworks not present in any previous JH source
- Personality Branding module is the CORE identity piece — defines JH's mission and philosophy
